since_last: 40% of 84 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +2.82%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 40% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.28% · BTC -1.94% · Gold -1.46% · Nasdaq100 +0.27%. 40% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +2.82%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +2.82%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -1.92%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BABA is the standout at +11.30%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +11.30%, ANET +8.23%, SMCI +6.44%, BIDU +5.02%, AVGO +4.56%. Laggards: PANW -4.80%, RXRX -3.90%, ZS -3.88%, UPST -3.69%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.11% at $149.31
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.11% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: BABA moving on no clear catalyst
cards.body: BABA is +11.45% with no fresh headline this cycle — attention without a story. Volume, not news, is doing the work.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
